mapper.sql: ACCOUNT_ID, USER_NUM, BANK_NAME, ACCOUNT_NUM, BALANCE, CREATE_DT, UPDATE_DT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNT ( ACCOUNT_ID, USER_NUM, BANK_NAME, ACCOUNT_NUM, BALANCE, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( SEQ_USER_ACCOUNT.NEXTVAL, #{userNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{bankName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{accountNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC, ACCOUNT_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_ACCOUNT SET BANK_NAME = #{bankName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ACCOUNT_NUM = #{accountNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DT = SYSDATE WHERE ACCOUNT_ID = #{accountId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND USER_NUM = #{userNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
